query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vault_access_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vault_id INT NOT NULL,
  document_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  action ENUM('view', 'download', 'upload', 'delete', 'share', 'print') NOT NULL,
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  user_agent TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vault_access_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vault_id INT NOT NULL,
  document_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  action ENUM('view', 'download', 'upload', 'delete', 'share', 'print') NOT NULL,
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  user_agent TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
